hooks.prompt:
Throughout this session, capture decisions, lessons, and insights into docs/logbook.md. User prompts are gold — every prompt may contain design direction, corrections, preferences, or patterns worth preserving. Extract and log them without being asked.

Entry format: - **YYYY-MM-DD** [type] — summary
Types: decision (choices made), lesson (mistakes/corrections), insight (patterns/concepts/context)

Rules: one sentence per entry. Read the logbook first to avoid duplicates. Append only. Never edit existing entries. If the file is over 100 lines, note this at the start of the session.
